content:
To determine the dates and weather for Saturday, April 25, 2026, I will use my built-in knowledge of historical and predicted weather patterns.

As of this writing in early 2023, exact forecast details a few years ahead are not yet available from official sources. However, I can provide general information about what type of weather could be expected based on historical averages and trends for late April in the Northern Hemisphere region where most K2 users reside.

Looking at past patterns, the end of April tends to bring moderate temperatures typical for spring, with possibly a mix of rain showers or thunderstorms still possible as the remnants of winter's wet season linger. Average high temps range from 50-65°F (10-18°C), lows around 35-45°F (2-7°C). 

Of course, microclimates and daily fluctuations mean conditions can vary. A warm front could push readings into the 70s°F (low 20s°C) for a day or two, while a cold low pressure system might bring some snow or freeze to lower elevations.

The best weather would likely be earlier in the week as high pressure dominates before warming temperatures cause instability later. Specific details like sunny intervals between rain showers probably won't be known until mid-April at the earliest.

So in summary for your date - cool spring-like conditions, chance of scattered showers still typical of late April's transition from winter to warmer weather, with daily variations possible. Exact details pending official forecasts around mid-2023. Consult local weather sources as that time approaches for specifics!
